title: Wayfarer (disambiguation)
content:
'''Wayfarer''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Wayfarer-class medium freighter|''Wayfarer''-class medium freighter]]'''

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Starships===
*'''''[[Tharen Wayfarer]]''''', a [[Kalarba Safari]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]]
*'''[[Wayfarer (Agave-class)|''Wayfarer'']]''', an [[Agave-class picket ship|''Agave''-class picket ship]]
*'''[[Wayfarer (freighter)|''Wayfarer'']]''', a [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]]
*'''[[Wayfarer (Mu-2 long range shuttle)|''Wayfarer'']]''', a [[Mu-2 long range shuttle|''Mu''-2 long range shuttle]]
*'''[[Wayfarer (spice transport)|''Wayfarer'']]''', a [[spice transport]]
*'''[[Wayfarer (Tof starship)|''Wayfarer'']]''', a [[Tof/Legends|Tof]] [[Star Cruiser/Legends|star cruiser]]
*The '''[[Wayfarer-class medium transport|''Wayfarer''-class medium transport]]'''

===Other===
*'''[[Project Wayfarer|Project: Wayfarer]]''', a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] exploration initiative
*'''''[[Wayfarer's Guide to Thrantas]]''''', a [[Book/Legends|book]]
*'''[[Wayfarer's Temple]]s'''
